original_image_tags: Aged, tan-colored document page, possibly the back of a form or a file folder. The page is heavily worn with ragged edges and several dark holes or punctures along the top margin. A strip of aged, yellowed adhesive tape is affixed vertically near the bottom center, partially covering a faint, inverted ink stamp. Handwritten pencil notations are visible in the bottom left corner.

elements.description: Aged paper page with two dark irregular holes at the top edge and torn bottom edges. A vertical strip of brown adhesive tape is near the bottom center. Faint reversed stamped text reading 'INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' and 'EST 72' is visible on a small rectangular label beneath the tape. Handwritten annotations are faintly visible in the bottom left corner.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific text from a stamp ('INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' and 'EST 72') while Description A describes the same stamp as a 'faint, inverted ink stamp' with no legible text, creating a direct contradiction on quoted content.
